name: get_strain
description: Retrieve daily strain data that quantifies the total cardiovascular load on the body throughout the day. Strain is measured on a 0-21 scale based on heart rate data. Each record includes the overall strain score, average and max heart rate, and total calorie expenditure.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start datetime in ISO 8601 format to filter results.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End datetime in ISO 8601 format to filter results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Pagination token for retrieving the next page of results.
